sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_shingles (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO test_shingles VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse® is a column-oriented database management system for online analytical processing of queries'), (2, 'Fuzz testing helps in identifying bugs and vulnerabilities');
UPDATE test_shingles SET text = 'ClickHouse is optimized for big data queries' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(text, 3, 6) FROM test_shingles WHERE id = 2;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(text) AS shingle_hashes FROM test_shingles;
